src/nim_arango/transport

      • protocol(t: Transport): Protocol

Transport layer for ArangoDB driver. Defines the Transport base type, Request/Response types, and protocol constants.

Types

Protocol = enum
  protHTTP = "http", protVST = "vst"
Request = ref object
  verb*: string
  path*: string
  query*: Table[string, string]
  headers*: Table[string, string]
  body*: string
Response = ref object
  statusCode*: int
  headers*: Table[string, string]
  body*: string
  endpoint*: string
Transport = ref object of RootObj
Base transport type. Override execute, endpoints, protocol, close via inheritance.

Procs

proc newRequest(verb, path: string): Request {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc queryString(r: Request): string {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc setBody(r: Request; body: string): Request {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc setHeader(r: Request; key, value: string): Request {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc setQuery(r: Request; key, value: string): Request {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}

Methods

method close(t: Transport) {.base, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
method endpoints(t: Transport): seq[string] {.base, ...raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
method execute(t: Transport; ctx: pointer; req: Request): Response {.base,
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
method protocol(t: Transport): Protocol {.base, ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
